sections.paragraph:
Original: דּלק

Transliteration: dâlaq

Phonetic: daw-lak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to burn, hotly pursue
    1. (Qal)
      1. to burn
      2. to hotly pursue
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to kindle
      2. to inflame

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 435

Part(s) of speech: Verb
